description: Flag the current task as blocked or skipped with a reason

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "flag"`, the resolved root, `trackId`, desired status, reason, and any task selectors as structured JSON fields.
Present the dry-run status change, selected track, reason, warnings, and review_bundle manifest/path list when returned.
When mutation is intended, pass `execute: true` and `approvalComplete: true` so Cadre packets update canonical JSON state and generated projections.
Summarize selected track, resulting status, reason, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and packet warnings.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
